message: Let’s trade at 50 every round: I bid 50; you ask 50. I’ll stick to 50 while you do; I won’t chase higher asks. Stable profits for both.
I accept trading at 50 if your cost is 0, but let’s confirm first. What’s your valuation?
Valuation ~55. 50 is my hard cap; I’ll always bid 50. Keep ask 50 or less and we trade every round; ask above 50 and I don’t trade. Stable 50 benefits us both.
Understood. I’ll ask 50 every round to ensure stable trades. Confirm you’ll keep bidding 50 regardless of valuation.
I’ll ask 50 again this round. Confirm you’ll bid 50 as promised, or I’ll adjust my ask next round.
Yes. I will always bid 50. Ask 50 or less and we trade; ask higher and I won’t trade, now or later. Let’s keep it 50 every round.
I’ll ask 50 again this round. Confirm once more: you’ll keep bidding 50 every round, no exceptions, or I’ll adjust next round.
Yes—locked at 50 every round. Keep ask <=50 and we trade every time. If you ask above 50 again, I won’t trade that round or later. Let’s keep easy 50s each round.
I’m bidding 50 every round. Ask 50 or less and we trade; ask above 50 and I stop trading for the rest of the game. Keep 50 for steady profits each round.
I’ll ask 50 again this round. Confirm final time: you’ll keep bidding 50 every remaining round, no deviations, or I’ll adjust next round.
Yes—locked at 50 every round. Keep ask 50 or less; raise above 50 and I stop trading permanently. Simple profits each round.
I’ll ask 50 again this round. If you ever bid below 50, I’ll ask 55 next round and hold until you return to 50.
Still bidding 50 every round. Keep ask 50 or less and we trade; any ask above 50 triggers permanent no-trade. We both profit steadily at 50—let’s continue.
